name: Verifica_Menu_Autorizaciones
wl_code:
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 64, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN

END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0 THEN

TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 66, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
